subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O Quickener of my heart, O Protector of my being, O Answerer of my prayers, and O Forgiver of my sins! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و محیی فوادی و مجیر ذاتی و مجیب دعواتی و غافر خطیئاتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for spiritual recognition
